epigraph: Chaos is spontaneous and happens without any effort, but Order comes at a cost.

jobs.title: Software Engineer
points: Core contributor on the merchant experience team, rebuilding merchant onboarding from scratch and cutting support tickets by up to 70%
Led the design of a self-serve merchant onboarding system, reducing ops dependency and raising activation throughput
Built a merchant-scoped AI support agent for the help center, with guardrails and tool-calling APIs for secure real-time retrieval
more: Architected and owned a draft-preview-publish configuration workflow across environments, making merchant-side config changes safe
Owned critical checkout flows, resolving high-impact merchant and payment reliability issues
Designed backend APIs for agent tool use with strict merchant-level data isolation

jobs.title: Product Development Engineer
points: Led the core Cards and Recurring Infra team at MandateHQ, building mandate creation for recurring payments at 50k/hr in Golang and Java
Led multi-network recurring payment integrations across Visa, Mastercard, and RuPay
Indexed high-usage databases from logs, cutting DB response time from 200ms to 50ms
more: Swapped emulation for cross-compilation, cutting build times by 84%
Fixed 30+ vulnerabilities to meet PCI DSS standards
Built Prometheus dashboards for API latencies and traffic; carried on-call with Spinnaker, Coralogix, and Zenduty
Single-handedly built an internal GenAI chatbot letting business teams query MandateHQ data in plain language

jobs.title: Full-Stack Developer
points: Cut video delivery latency to 120ms by redesigning secure media workflows on AWS S3
Wrote six core and five auxiliary microservices from scratch, and their frontends
Integrated Stripe and Razorpay payments, directly feeding platform monetization
